overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Starfield showing a character in an orange spacesuit walking around a large landed spaceship (the Frontier) at the New Atlantis spaceport. The character explores the vessel's exterior as it vents steam, with futuristic city buildings and a massive rocky outcrop visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceport landing pad with large landed vessel

events.description: text overlay 'City of New Atlantis' fades in at bottom of screen
character approaches and begins walking under the ship's engine section

agents.ego_description: approaching the landed spaceship from the rear, moving steadily toward the vessel's massive engines

entered.detail: large white and industrial gray spaceship with red accents and heavy landing gear
futuristic curved skyscrapers with white and teal color scheme rising against rocky cliffs
marked tarmac with white directional lines and orange warning stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit spaceport landing pad with a massive spaceship dominating the view. The player character in an orange suit approaches the vessel from the rear as text identifies the location as New Atlantis. The character moves steadily toward the ship's engine section, with futuristic city towers visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: underneath spaceship engine section with active steam venting

events.description: heavy steam vents activate from ship's engines, creating dense atmospheric clouds
character emerges from under the ship and continues along the port side

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the massive engine section, navigating through thick venting steam and passing the landing struts

entered.detail: massive cylindrical engines with glowing blue vents and heavy steam emissions
heavy hydraulic landing gear with yellow and black warning markings

segments.scene_description: The character moves underneath the spaceship's massive hull, passing through clouds of venting steam from the active engines. The lighting becomes diffused under the vessel's shadow as the player navigates around the heavy landing struts. The ship's industrial details and mechanical components are visible up close before the character emerges back into open sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: landing pad perimeter with view of city towers

events.description: camera pans upward along the ship's hull to reveal the cockpit and upper cityscape
spaceship begins to exit left frame as view opens toward the terminal structure ahead

agents.ego_description: circling around the ship's nose section while the camera tilts up to show the vessel's scale against the towering city buildings

notable_agents.action: distant worker in yellow safety suit visible near the terminal entrance

entered.detail: angular cockpit module with red trim and panoramic window arrays
large futuristic terminal building with transparent geodesic roof structure

segments.scene_description: Walking past the ship's nose, the camera tilts upward to showcase the vessel's full height against the backdrop of New Atlantis's towering skyscrapers and a massive rocky outcrop. The glass canopy of the spaceport terminal becomes visible in the distance ahead. The ship gradually moves out of frame as the focus shifts toward the destination structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceport terminal approach with covered walkway

events.description: spaceship completely exits view left, opening the full approach to the terminal
character approaches the ramp leading up to the glass canopy terminal entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the spaceport terminal entrance along the curved ramp, leaving the landing pad area

entered.detail: curved ascending walkway with white and orange safety barriers leading to the terminal
white curved architecture with teal accent stripes and glass balcony railings

segments.scene_description: With the spaceship now behind, the character approaches the impressive glass-canopied terminal of the New Atlantis spaceport. The camera moves along the curved ramp toward the entrance, showcasing the futuristic architecture with its white curves and transparent roofing. The scene ends as the character nears the terminal threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the industrial rear of a massive spaceship toward the sleek, futuristic entrance of a spaceport terminal. It begins on a sunlit landing pad where a character in an orange suit approaches the vessel's engine section with distant city towers on the horizon. As the character moves underneath the hull, the lighting shifts to a diffused shadow amidst clouds of venting steam and heavy landing struts before emerging back into the open light. The scene then expands as the camera tilts upward to showcase the ship's full height against a backdrop of skyscrapers and a massive rocky outcrop, before the vessel gradually slides out of frame. Finally, the focus shifts entirely toward the destination as the character walks along a curved ramp toward the white architecture and transparent glass canopy of the New Atlantis terminal.
